cardano/address/Address.title: Address
cardano/address/Address.description:
A Cardano `Address` typically holding one or two credential references.

 Note that legacy bootstrap addresses (a.k.a. 'Byron addresses') are
 completely excluded from Plutus contexts. Thus, from an on-chain
 perspective only exists addresses of type 00, 01, ..., 07 as detailed
 in [CIP-0019 :: Shelley Addresses](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/CIPs/tree/master/CIP-0019/#shelley-addresses).

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/PaymentCredential.title: PaymentCredential
cardano/address/PaymentCredential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/StakeCredential.title: StakeCredential
cardano/address/StakeCredential.description:
Represent a type of object that can be represented either inline (by hash)
 or via a reference (i.e. a pointer to an on-chain location).

 This is mainly use for capturing pointers to a stake credential
 registration certificate in the case of so-called pointer addresses.

ctf/bank_types/AccountDatum.title: AccountDatum
ctf/bank_types/AccountDatum.description:
Shared types for the CTF bank series validators
 The datum stored at an account script address

ctf/bank_types/AccountRedeemer.title: AccountRedeemer
ctf/bank_types/AccountRedeemer.description: Actions that can be performed on an account

ctf_hello_world/Redeemer.title: Redeemer
ctf_hello_world/Redeemer.description: Redeemer containing a message that must match the secret password

ctf_king_of_cardano/Datum.title: Datum
ctf_king_of_cardano/Datum.description: Datum for the king of cardano competition

fields.title: current_king
fields.description: Current king's address (receives payment when overthrown)

anyOf.title: OverthrowKing
anyOf.description: Pay more than current amount to become the new king

anyOf.title: CloseCompetition
anyOf.description: Close the competition (only current king can do this)

ctf_lending/LendingDatum.title: LendingDatum
ctf_lending/LendingDatum.description: Datum for a P2P lending contract

anyOf.title: RequestLoan
anyOf.description: Borrower requests a loan by locking collateral

anyOf.title: Lend
anyOf.description: Lender provides funds to the borrower

anyOf.title: Repay
anyOf.description: Borrower repays the loan with interest

ctf_multisig_treasury/MultisigDatum.title: MultisigDatum
ctf_multisig_treasury/MultisigDatum.description:
Datum for the multisig coordinator
 Tracks the intended release, beneficiary, required signers, and who has signed

anyOf.title: Sign
anyOf.description: Add a signature to the multisig

anyOf.title: Use
anyOf.description: Use the multisig to release funds (VULNERABLE)

ctf_multisig_treasury_v2/MultisigDatum.title: MultisigDatum
ctf_multisig_treasury_v2/MultisigDatum.description: Datum for the enhanced multisig coordinator with validation token

anyOf.title: Sign
anyOf.description: Add a signature to the multisig

anyOf.title: Use
anyOf.description: Use the multisig to release funds

ctf_multisig_treasury_v2/ValidationMintR.title: ValidationMintRedeemer
ctf_multisig_treasury_v2/ValidationMintR.description: Redeemer for the validation token minting policy

anyOf.title: MintValidation
anyOf.description: Mint a new validation token (VULNERABLE)

anyOf.title: BurnValidation
anyOf.description: Burn a validation token

ctf_multisig_treasury_v3/MultisigDatum.title: MultisigDatum
ctf_multisig_treasury_v3/MultisigDatum.description: Datum for the enhanced multisig coordinator with validation token

anyOf.title: Sign
anyOf.description: Add a signature to the multisig

anyOf.title: Use
anyOf.description: Use the multisig to release funds (now requires burning validation token)

ctf_multisig_treasury_v3/ValidationMintR.title: ValidationMintRedeemer
ctf_multisig_treasury_v3/ValidationMintR.description: Redeemer for the validation token minting policy

anyOf.title: MintValidation
anyOf.description: Mint a new validation token

anyOf.title: BurnValidation
anyOf.description: Burn a validation token (required for Use)

ctf_purchase_offer/Datum.title: Datum
ctf_purchase_offer/Datum.description:
Datum for the purchase offer
 Represents an offer to buy an NFT with a specific policy ID

fields.title: owner
fields.description: Owner who will receive the NFT

fields.title: desired_policy_id
fields.description: The policy ID of the desired NFT

fields.title: desired_token_name
fields.description: Optional specific token name; if None, any token from the policy is accepted

ctf_purchase_offer/SellRedeemer.title: SellRedeemer
ctf_purchase_offer/SellRedeemer.description: Redeemer that specifies which token is being sold

fields.title: sold_policy_id
fields.description: The policy ID of the token being sold

fields.title: sold_token_name
fields.description: The token name of the token being sold

ctf_sell_nft/Datum.title: Datum
ctf_sell_nft/Datum.description: Datum for an NFT listing: seller address and price in lovelace
